title: Farabi
content:
Farabi

Farabi exchange program Briefly "Farabi exchange program called" student and faculty exchange program between higher education institutions, and high technology institutes within the college, bachelor's, master's and doctoral level education among higher education institutions engaged in student and faculty exchange program. The Farabi Exchange Program aims to enable students or faculty members to continue their education and training activities at a higher education institution outside their own institutions for one or two semesters.

This content was updated on 11/07/2024.
